description: Letter fragment from Shabbetay b. Avraham he-Ḥaver (the judge of Minyat Zifta, active 1135–78) to Natan b. Shemuel he-Ḥaver (active 1128–1164). This is the upper margin and the address only. Shabbetay includes a wish for Natan’s recovery in the address and reports that he was ill himself—with a bone in his leg that had not been set properly—and apologizes for not presenting himself. He had not come to Fustat for five months. Information from Goitein’s note cards and Med Soc II, 44. See also card #27137.
tags: illness letter 969-1517, bonesetter, Illness, Illness: treatment, illness: limb
description_he: שבר מכתב משבתאי בן אברהם החבר (שופט מנית זפתא, 1135-78) לנתן בן שמואל החבר; שוליים עליונים וכתובת בלבד; שבתאי מתנצל שלא בא לפוסטאט חמישה חודשים
